area: Rosyth School 1km — landed for sale (Serangoon Gardens east edge / Serangoon North)
pulled: 2026-07-03 via WebSearch + OneMap 距离实测（PropertyGuru / 99.co / EdgeProp / SRX; direct fetch 403-blocked）
benchmark_note: Ranges drawn from the 13 listings above (computed land_psf where land_sqft was available) plus EdgeProp's estate-wide 12-month transacted range of S$1,131-S$3,472 psf as a cross-check anchor. Detached/bungalow range is thin (only 2-3 usable data points: Serangoon Garden Way bungalow ~S$1,500 psf, and EdgeProp-cited detached listings at S$1,090-S$1,330 psf) -- treat detached benchmark as low-confidence. Semi-D upper bound (S$3,003 psf, Bridport Ave) is from a listing whose catchment is likely OUTSIDE the 1km ring -- if restricting strictly to confirmed in-1km streets (Lichfield Rd, Brockhampton Dr), the semi-D/terrace range compresses to roughly S$1,470-S$2,530 psf. Recommend the geography-lead/estates slice re-verify each street's actual distance via OneMap before locking benchmark to 'in-1km' vs 'estate-wide'.

listings.notes: PropertyGuru listing; 2.5-storey, home lift, swimming pool. Land_psf computed as price/land_sqft = 9,380,000/3,692. OneMap street-ref 1.88km（1-2km 带）。
99.co listing snippet only gave land 2,441-2,655 sqft range and 5 beds; price/psf not captured -- needs direct portal check before use as a hard data point. OneMap street-ref 1.88km（1-2km 带）。

listings.street: Sandilands Road area (Serangoon Garden Estate, exact street per listing title only)

listings.street: Lorong Chuan (The Jardine Residences, Serangoon Garden fringe)
listings.notes: Included for price-spectrum context only; almost certainly outside Rosyth 1km ring given Lorong Chuan-side location. OneMap street-ref 2.3km（1-2km 带）。

2.5-storey semi-D. Land_psf computed as 6,480,000/2,158. Bridport Ave is deep in Serangoon Gardens core, away from Rosyth -- do not count as in-1km without OneMap confirmation. OneMap street-ref 1.36km（1-2km 带）。

Large 9-bed corner terrace, built-up 8,300 sqft, S$1,792.77 psf on built-up basis (per 99.co listing title) -- land_sqft not given so true land psf not computable; do not conflate built-up psf with land psf in downstream benchmark. OneMap street-ref 1.3km（1-2km 带）。
SRX aggregate search page returned this as one of several Cowdray Ave listings; land_psf computed as 6,000,000/2,605. OneMap street-ref 1.3km（1-2km 带）。
99.co listing gives S$1,469.48 psf explicitly (land basis) -- lowest-priced entry in this sample, useful as lower benchmark anchor. OneMap street-ref 1.45km（1-2km 带）。
Price listed as negotiable per SRX summary. Land_psf computed 5,550,000/2,222. OneMap street-ref 1.19km（1-2km 带）。
5,000 sqft land bungalow; land_psf computed as 7,500,000/5,000 (99.co listed built-up=land here, treat with caution -- may be built-up only). OneMap street-ref 1.19km（1-2km 带）。

listings.flood_risk: unverified -- Serangoon North has had historical PUB flood-alert monitoring near Sungei Serangoon; check PUB flood-prone areas list
listings.notes: 11 min walk to Serangoon North MRT (CR9) per listing. Land_psf computed as 6,500,000/2,572. This is the strongest in-1km candidate street given proximity to the school on the same (Serangoon North Ave 4) side. OneMap street-ref 1.08km（⚠margin：近校端门牌可能 <1km，逐址实测）。

listings.flood_risk: unverified -- check PUB flood-prone list for Serangoon North
listings.notes: 6-bed terrace. Land_psf computed as 5,500,000/2,796. Alongside Lichfield Rd, this is one of the closest actual streets to the school. OneMap street-ref 2.04km（1-2km 带）。

Lowest total quantum in the sample. 99.co explicitly states S$1,477 psf. Listed 5 days before search (recency noted in search snippet, exact listing date not independently confirmed). OneMap street-ref 2.04km（1-2km 带）。
